THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF JEREMY AMADE HILL EDWARDS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFFS ARMAND HARB, MICHAEL MILLION, JAMES CHAVEZ, JOSEPH HENRY PULVERMAN ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL. PLAINTIFF JEREMY AMADE HILL EDWARDS INFORMS THE COURT THAT OTHER PLAINTIFFS WILL NOT BE APPEARING ON TODAY'S MATTER AND REQUESTING THE COURT TO DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
